_meta.notes: Tutorial vendor — Phase 5 Day 18-19. The first NPC most players will meet who deals in coins. A wandering trader named Old Veft who appears in towns and marketplaces. Catalog is small and central-bank priced (sellPrice always < buyPrice) so the player can't sell-buy-sell-buy at zero cost. Tuned so a starter slime with 50 coins can buy 5-10 starter resources without grinding.

tagline: a stooped figure under three layers of dust-cloak, beads of every color sewn at the hem.

behavior.default: shuffles between piles of small wares, mumbling prices to himself
behavior.ifAttacked: freezes; mutters 'I have no coins. The coins are not here.'
narrativeHooks: Old Veft's hands are always cold. Coins warm in them faster than skin.
A bead clicks against another bead at his hem. He listens before answering.
He never asks where you came from. He has been many places where the answer is 'nowhere good.'

interactions.trade: available — call trade_with_npc with the vendor's npcId
interactions.speak: available; he answers in short, useful phrases
interactions.give: rejected — 'gifts make a debt I cannot count'
